entries.source: "Explain recursion in JavaScript"
entries.value: "JavaScriptમાં recursion સમજાવો"

entries.source: "Help debug this error"
entries.value: "આ error debug કરવામાં મદદ કરો"

entries.source: "Teach me Python loops"
entries.value: "Python loops શીખવો"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Code Tutor on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: prompts, study loops અને વધુ સુરક્ષિત AI habits સાથે stem learning માટે inspir પર Code Tutor વાપરવાની વ્યવહારુ માર્ગદર્શિકા.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: એક વધુ મજબૂત study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI ટ્યુટર

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે એક small પ્રથમ પગલું rather than એક અંતિમ જવાબ.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: પૂછો આ AI માટે તપાસો તમારું reasoning, નહીં just આ result.

entries.source: Beginner and intermediate programmers who need explanations, debugging help, or project coaching.
entries.value: શરૂઆત કરનારા અને મધ્યમ સ્તરના પ્રોગ્રામર્સ જેમને સમજૂતી, ડિબગિંગમાં મદદ અથવા પ્રોજેક્ટ કોચિંગની જરૂર છે.

entries.source: Code Tutor
entries.value: કોડ ટ્યુટર

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building passive answer collection બદલે learning માટે AI વાપરવાનો focused માર્ગ છે. આ mode એક ચોક્કસ કામ માટે બનાવાયેલ છે: સમજો code, debug errors, શીખો concepts, અને બનાવો small projects step દ્વારા step.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: practical guide
entries.value: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: વ્યવહારુ માર્ગદર્શિકા

entries.source: Explain the bug.
entries.value: સમજાવો આ bug.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish દ્વારા લેખન આ idea back માંથી memory.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts માટે try

entries.source: Start the live mode at Code Tutor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Project Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: live mode Code Tutor. જો તમે want a neighboring learning format, try Project Coach. For a broader view of આ platform, read શું an AI learning companion should do for everyone પર શરૂ કરો.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell આ mode શું તમે છે trying માટે શીખો અથવા produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: તે difference shows up માં આ flow. બદલે one giant response, આ best sessions move દ્વારા એક loop: set એક goal, try something, get feedback, repair આ નબળો ભાગ, અને પસંદ કરો આ આગલું action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: તે focus matters. A general chatbot કરી શકે જવાબ almost anything, પણ એક learning mode gives આ conversation એક shape. It nudges તમે toward આ kindનું thinking, practice કરો, feedback, અથવા exploration કે helps આ idea stick.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: ટ્યુટર તમને પૂછે છે કે તમે કોડ પાસેથી શું અપેક્ષા રાખો છો, અને પછી વર્તનને સમજવા માટે નાના ઉદાહરણો અને પરીક્ષણોનો ઉપયોગ કરે છે.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: આ છે આ same habit behind studying સાથે AI વિના cheating yourself: keep આ learner active. AI છે most ઉપયોગી જ્યારે it gives તમે feedback પર તમારું thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: આ mode છે especially ઉપયોગી માટે learners કોણ want to:

entries.source: Try a small fix.
entries.value: Try એક small fix.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try આ step માં તમારું own words.

entries.source: Understand the concept.
entries.value: સમજો આ concept.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Code Tutor વાપરો જ્યારે ઝડપથી શરૂ થતું છતાં તમને અનુરૂપ બનેલું session જોઈએ. પહેલો goal પ્રભાવ પાડવાનો નથી; પહેલો goal આગળનું પગલું શક્ય લાગે એવું બનાવવાનો છે.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: શું આ mode helps સાથે

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: ક્યાં માટે go next

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: તમે કરી શકે also શરૂ કરો સાથે એક rough versionનું તમારું વાસ્તવિક problem. A messy first prompt છે fine. આ session કરી શકે clarify આ level, audience, deadline, અને style once તમે begin.
